summary: Iteration 328: FINAL COMPREHENSIVE SWEEP - ALL 19 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Light Therapy with Chaos Engine z/z drift - 7 colors visible, Red+Blue blend shows 'Anpo Root', Sound On/Off toggle works, Generate AI Scene button exists. (2) Global glass-blur CSS via SceneEngine.js - verified on Aromatherapy, Reiki, Teachings, Sacred Texts, Yoga, Numerology, Herbology. (3) Encyclopedia ConceptCard expansion with AI explore button. (4) All 62 modules tested on mobile viewport 390x844.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final comprehensive sweep complete. All key features verified: (1) ChaosEngine.js exports chaosValue() and chaosDrift() - imported into LightTherapy.js useColorAudio hook for z/z frequency drift on all active oscillators. (2) SceneEngine.js injects global CSS for glass-blur treatment on body.scene-active .immersive-page elements with rounded-xl/rounded-lg p-4/p-3 classes. (3) Encyclopedia ConceptCard with useState for expanded state, onClick toggles, 'Explore deeper' button calls POST /api/encyclopedia/explore. Mobile viewport 390x844 used for all tests.
